a: Yes, completely free. No paywalls, no subscriptions, no watermarks on your PDFs - ever.

q: Do I need an account to use Invoy?
a: No account needed. Just open the app and start creating invoices instantly.

q: Can I calculate Taxes and Discounts?
a: Yes! Invoy supports custom Tax percentage, flat/percentage discounts, and shipping charges. You can even customize the tax name (e.g. GST, VAT).
Absolutely. Invoy is built specifically for freelancers, consultants, agencies and small businesses.
